'''âz-th-n''' ('''kazathan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yell|yell]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-th-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yell|yell]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-th-n
|-
! Lemma
| kazathan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizathan|thizathan]] || [[word:jizathan|jizathan]] || [[word:shizathan|shizathan]] || [[word:kizathan|kizathan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzathan|thuthuzathan]] || [[word:jujuzathan|jujuzathan]] || [[word:shushuzathan|shushuzathan]] || [[word:kukuzathan|kukuzathan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzathan|thuzathan]] || [[word:juzathan|juzathan]] || [[word:shuzathan|shuzathan]] || [[word:kuzathan|kuzathan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzathan|thuzathan]] || [[word:juzathan|juzathan]] || [[word:shuzathan|shuzathan]] || [[word:kuzathan|kuzathan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezathan|thezathan]] || [[word:jezathan|jezathan]] || [[word:shezathan|shezathan]] || [[word:kezathan|kezathan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozathan|thothozathan]] || [[word:jojozathan|jojozathan]] || [[word:shoshozathan|shoshozathan]] || [[word:kokozathan|kokozathan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozathan|thozathan]] || [[word:jozathan|jozathan]] || [[word:shozathan|shozathan]] || [[word:kozathan|kozathan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozathan|thozathan]] || [[word:jozathan|jozathan]] || [[word:shozathan|shozathan]] || [[word:kozathan|kozathan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzathan|thĂŠzathan]] || [[word:jĂŠzathan|jĂŠzathan]] || [[word:shĂŠzathan|shĂŠzathan]] || [[word:kĂŠzathan|kĂŠzathan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazathan|thathazathan]] || [[word:jajazathan|jajazathan]] || [[word:shashazathan|shashazathan]] || [[word:kakazathan|kakazathan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazathan|thazathan]] || [[word:jazathan|jazathan]] || [[word:shazathan|shazathan]] || [[word:kazathan|kazathan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazathan|thazathan]] || [[word:jazathan|jazathan]] || [[word:shazathan|shazathan]] || [[word:kazathan|kazathan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazathan|shazathan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazathan|goshazathan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazathan|gokishazathan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazathanĂŒ|shazathanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazathanknĂŒ|goshazathanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazathanĂŒ|gokishazathanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazathanshĂ«|shazathanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazathankshĂ«|goshazathankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazathanshĂ«|gokishazathanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazathanro|shazathanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazathankro|goshazathankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazathanro|gokishazathanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazathanmu|shazathanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazathankmu|goshazathankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazathanmu|gokishazathanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazathansher|shazathansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazathanksher|goshazathanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazathansher|gokishazathansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazathang|shazathang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazathankng|goshazathankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazathang|gokishazathang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazathanya|shazathanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazathankya|goshazathankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazathanya|gokishazathanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazathanyam|shazathanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazathankyam|goshazathankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazathanyam|gokishazathanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazathanĂŒshĂ«|shazathanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazathanknĂŒshĂ«|goshazathanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazathanĂŒshĂ«|gokishazathanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazathanĂŒro|shazathanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazathanknĂŒro|goshazathanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazathanĂŒro|gokishazathanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazathanĂŒmu|shazathanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazathanknĂŒmu|goshazathanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazathanĂŒmu|gokishazathanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazathanshĂ«nĂŒ|shazathanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazathankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazathankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazathanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazathanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazathanshĂ«ro|shazathanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazathankshĂ«ro|goshazathankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazathanshĂ«ro|gokishazathanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazathanshĂ«mu|shazathanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazathankshĂ«mu|goshazathankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazathanshĂ«mu|gokishazathanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazathanronĂŒ|shazathanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazathankronĂŒ|goshazathankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazathanronĂŒ|gokishazathanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazathanroshĂ«|shazathanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazathankroshĂ«|goshazathankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazathanroshĂ«|gokishazathanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazathanromu|shazathanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazathankromu|goshazathankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazathanromu|gokishazathanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazathanmunĂŒ|shazathanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazathankmunĂŒ|goshazathankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazathanmunĂŒ|gokishazathanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazathanmushĂ«|shazathanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazathankmushĂ«|goshazathankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazathanmushĂ«|gokishazathanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazathanmuro|shazathanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazathankmuro|goshazathankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazathanmuro|gokishazathanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
